name: Landmark Rewards SBI Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under Landmark Rewards SBI Card terms
milestoneBenefits: 8,000 bonus reward points on annual retail spends of Rs 2 lakh
additionalBenefits: 2,000 bonus reward points after joining fee payment
10 reward points per Rs 100 at Landmark stores including Lifestyle, Max, Home Centre, Spar, Babyshop and EasyBuy
5 reward points per Rs 100 on dining and movie spends
1 reward point per Rs 100 on other non-fuel eligible retail spends
4 reward points equal Rs 1 when redeemed at eligible Landmark stores
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel spends from Rs 500 to Rs 3,000, capped at Rs 100 per month
